item.title: A motorcycle with \"black technology\" that never stalls, would you buy it?【Super Serious Youth】
item.itunes:title: A motorcycle with \"black technology\" that never stalls, would you buy it?【Super Serious Youth】
item.itunes:author: 超認真少年Imserious
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FFcCYlnhbF0 Special thanks to: BMW Motor Become a member of this channel and get benefits: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCckzc03-ycrpB1XIUfRhpnw/join 📍Latest news/Cooperation info Portal: https://portaly.cc/imserious 【Popular Videos】 \"Air Compressor\" - Basic Demonstration, Turns Out Every Home Needs an Air Compressor How to use Air compressor https://youtu.be/Wghd4LpM6DE Learn CNC Basics! Unboxing a Million-Dollar German CNC! Taichung Precision【Hidden Factory】What's CNC? https://youtu.be/KZ0lIzlYHw4 Hardware Store even sells daughters? Taiwan Hardware Store Guide https://youtu.be/_Y0jLEeENp8 Golden Marriage! Which company offers the highest salary for serious recruitment? 【Super Serious Youth】 https://youtu.be/f0lWUPiUDnw Surprise Marriage Second Part! Taking the Daughter Directly in Front of Father-in-law to See the Big Future 【Super Serious Youth】KITAGAWA Machine Tool \u0026 Chuck https://youtu.be/47cGn20vv5s
